summary: David, what a week you've had! You've now lost 64.1 pounds from your starting weight of 315—that's a massive achievement that speaks to your commitment. Your steady loss of 1.2 pounds per week shows you're in a sustainable rhythm, and hitting 250.9 pounds means you're well into new territory. I noticed you logged 11 days this period, which is solid, but let's aim to capture all seven days next week so we can spot any patterns that might help fine-tune things even more. You're doing the hard work consistently, and that consistency is exactly what creates lasting change. Keep going.
